overall.description: First-person gameplay footage from Cyberpunk 2077 showing a walk through Night City's downtown district. The player moves from a plaza with neon vendor stalls along a busy street under an overpass, past futuristic vehicles and holographic advertisements, then crosses an intersection with expansive views of towering skyscrapers against a clear afternoon sky.

events.description: moving from covered plaza area toward street level with overpass structure becoming visible

agents.ego_description: walking steadily through the pedestrian plaza past the VNS vendor stall toward the street

entered.detail: small vendor booth with purple neon lighting and VNS signage
bright purple neon light strips illuminating the vendor area
tall palm trees scattered throughout the plaza area
towering glass and steel buildings with futuristic architecture visible in the distance
elevated highway structure crossing above the street ahead

segments.scene_description: Walking through an open pedestrian plaza with neon-lit vendor stalls and scattered palm trees. The concrete ground reflects the afternoon sunlight as the camera approaches a street overpass with towering futuristic skyscrapers visible in the background.

scene_state.functional_zone: covered sidewalk beneath elevated highway with commercial facades

events.description: futuristic purple and red vehicles driving along the street alongside the sidewalk
passing a large digital billboard displaying a yellow sports car advertisement on the building facade

agents.ego_description: walking along the covered sidewalk under the overpass, observing the traffic and digital advertisements

notable_agents.action: purple futuristic sedan driving along the street parallel to the sidewalk

entered.detail: massive concrete overpass structure casting shadows over the sidewalk
low-rise blue building with commercial signage and large display screens
vertical sign with All Foods branding on the building corner
massive horizontal screen displaying a yellow sports car against pink and yellow stripes
metal railing separating the sidewalk from the street

segments.scene_description: Moving along a covered sidewalk beneath an elevated highway, with moderate traffic of futuristic vehicles passing by on the left. A large digital billboard displaying a yellow sports car dominates the right side, while the blue commercial building features an All Foods sign above.

scene_state.functional_zone: busy intersection with pedestrian crosswalk and traffic signals

events.description: approaching the Poplar street intersection with traffic lights and crosswalk markings visible
crossing the street at the crosswalk while vehicles wait at the traffic signal

agents.ego_description: crossing the intersection at Poplar street while observing the downtown skyline with other pedestrians

notable_agents.action: pedestrian with orange hair and purple top walking ahead across the crosswalk

entered.detail: red street sign with white text reading Poplar suspended over the intersection
red metal structure supporting traffic lights spanning the intersection
yellow and white striped pedestrian crossing markings on the asphalt
rounded corner building with teal and green facade at the intersection
walk signal sign with yellow pedestrian symbol

segments.scene_description: Approaching and crossing the Poplar street intersection, transitioning from the covered sidewalk to an open crosswalk. The view opens up to reveal the dense downtown skyline with towering glass skyscrapers against the clear sky, while pedestrians cross alongside the camera and vehicles wait at the traffic signal.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person movement from a sunlit pedestrian plaza into the dense, towering urban canyon of a futuristic downtown district. It begins by gliding through an open plaza filled with neon-lit vendor stalls and palm trees, moving across concrete that reflects the afternoon light toward a massive street overpass. As the camera passes beneath the elevated highway, the environment shifts into a shaded corridor of covered sidewalks, flanked by passing futuristic vehicles and a dominant digital billboard advertising a yellow sports car. The scene then opens up as the camera crosses the Poplar street intersection, transitioning from the enclosure of the overpass to an expansive view of the city. Finally, the perspective reveals a dense skyline of glass skyscrapers reaching toward a clear sky while pedestrians and idling traffic fill the wide crosswalk.
